
```{ojs}
makeIsotype = function({
  inputData,
  shapeDomain = ["Lebensmittel", "Wohnen", "Energie", "Mobilität", "Güter", "Dienstleistungen"],
  shapeRange = [path1, path2, path3, path4, path5, path6],
  colorRange = colors_fiw,
  xDomain = [0, 20],
  height = 340
}) {

  const chartIsotypeMain = vl.markPoint({
      size: 5,
      stroke: "black",
      strokeOpacity: 1,
      strokeWidth: 0.75,
      opacity: 1,
      clip: false,
      // dy: -100,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("sequence(0, round(datum.value / 1000))").as("positions"),
      vl.flatten(["positions"]),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("name")
        .sort(shapeDomain)
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          title: null,
          labelOffset: 14,
        }),
      // vl.yOffset().value(-8),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positions")
        .scale({
          domain: xDomain,
          nice: false,
          zero: false,
        })
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("name")
        .scale({
          range: colorRange,
        })
        .legend(false),
      vl.shape()
        .fieldN("name")
        .scale({
          domain: shapeDomain,
          range: shapeRange
        })
        .legend(false)
    )

  return vl.layer(
    chartIsotypeMain,
  )
  .width(makeWidth(width))
  .height(height)
  .facet({
    column: {
      field: "Quantile",
      type: "nominal",
      title: null,
      sort: ["Arm", "Reich"],
      header: {
        labelFontSize: 15,
        labelOrient: "top",
        labelPadding: 6,
      },
    },
  })
  .resolve({scale: {x: "shared"}})
  .data(inputData)
  .config(config);

}
```
